case_title: LAURA M. JURY VS. AGI PUBLISHING - VALLEY YELLOW PAGES

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF JURY, LAURA M. DBA ELITE HOUSEKEEPING SERVICES
STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFORE JUDGE PRO TEM QUEENA HO FILED BY JURY, LAURA M. DBA ELITE HOUSEKEEPING SERVICES AGI PUBLISHING - VALLEY YELLOW PAGES

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $467.60 FILED BY JURY, LAURA M. DBA ELITE HOUSEKEEPING SERVICES AS TO DEFENDANT AGI PUBLISHING - VALLEY YELLOW PAGES ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-03-2009 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (SERVICE FEE $30.00) SERVED APR-06-2009, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT AGI PUBLISHING - VALLEY YELLOW PAGES
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED SEP-01-2009 ORDERED DESTROYED

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUN-03-2009 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUN-03-2009 BY JUDGE PRO TEM: QUEENA HO. APPEARANCES BY BOTH PARTIES. EXHIBITS RETAINED. FRANCISCO HULSE INTERPRETS ENGLISH/SPANISH - SPANISH/ENGLISH ON PLAINTIFF'S BEHALF. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT AGI PUBLISHING - VALLEY YELLOW PAGES
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-03-2009 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF JURY, LAURA M. DBA ELITE HOUSEKEEPING SERVICES IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT AGI PUBLISHING - VALLEY YELLOW PAGES PLAINTIFF HAS PAID A TOTAL OF $710.18 TO DEFENDANT FOR ADVERTISING IN THE YELLOW PAGES. THE CONTRACT STATES THAT CANCELLATION IS PER TERMS "ON THE REVERSE SIDE." THE COURT FINDS THAT THE PLAINTIFF HAS CANCELLED THE CONTRACT EFFECTIVE JUNE 3, 2009 AND OWES NO ADDITIONAL AMOUNTS UNDER THE ADVERTISING CONTRACT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
